diagrams.caption: Four-Panel LLM Internals Visualization Architecture
diagrams.description: Top row shows two panels: left 'Tokenization' box contains 'Hello world' → ['Hello', ' world'] → [15496, 995]. Right 'Attention Weights' box shows 4x4 heatmap grid labeled 'Layer 1 Head 1' with darker squares indicating stronger connections. Bottom row: left 'Hidden States' box shows 3 stacked layers with dots representing vector dimensions. Right 'Output Probabilities' box shows horizontal bar chart with 'the' (0.15), 'world' (0.12), 'is' (0.08). Arrows connect panels clockwise showing data flow.
